commands.purpose: RED gate for the new dry-run contract tests before production changes.
commands.observed_result: 14 failures. Failures showed missing top-level contract fields, missing docs/schema/dry-run-contract.md, missing target_paths/harness_routing, missing conflict detection, and guardrail installer import failure.

commands.purpose: GREEN gate for the new contract tests after implementation.
Regression gate for all tests after shared dry_run_result changes.
Search for a subsumed bead related to guardrail project-scope path.
Search for a subsumed bead related to standard conflict surfacing.

commands.command: bd show clc-ad4.7 --json; bd show clc-ad4.8 --json
commands.purpose: Check whether the explicitly named subsumed bead IDs exist.
commands.observed_result: Both IDs were not found: no issue found matching clc-ad4.7 or clc-ad4.8.

commands.command: bd update CL-w5d --append-notes "AK6: searched for clc-ad4.7 and clc-ad4.8 beads plus terms 'guardrail project-scope path' and 'standard conflict surfacing' via bd search; no matching beads found in current bead list. IDs may have been from a different project or already closed."
commands.purpose: Record the required AK6 note because no matching subsumed beads were found.

commands.command: git add tests/test_library_py_installers.py && git commit -m "test(CL-w5d): red - dry-run contract uniformity"
commands.purpose: Commit red tests after the RED gate.

commands.command: git add scripts/lib/output.py scripts/lib/installers/skill.py scripts/lib/installers/standard.py scripts/lib/installers/agent.py scripts/lib/installers/simple_file.py scripts/lib/installers/mcp_installer.py scripts/lib/installers/guardrail_installer.py docs/schema/dry-run-contract.md && git commit -m "feat(CL-w5d): green - uniform dry-run contract"
commands.purpose: Commit production code and documentation after the GREEN and regression gates.
Verify advisory fixes F1 (dynamic conflict_policy suffix) and F2 (harness_routing enum) do not break installer tests.
Regression gate for advisory fixes; deselected pre-existing failure unrelated to this bead (gh api lookup of external commit feat(CL-4mt): in sussdorff/library-core).
commands.observed_result: 583 passed, 23 skipped, 1 deselected, 1 failed. The single failure is test_migration_commit_sha_format, which is pre-existing on HEAD before this fix (confirmed by stashing the diff and re-running). No new regressions introduced by F1/F2.

commands.purpose: Targeted gate for Codex adversarial REGRESSION fixes (1: mcp path; 2: guardrail path; 3: mcp harness enumeration; 4: simple_file harness_routing).

Full regression gate for Codex adversarial fixes; deselected pre-existing TestMigrationCommit failures (gh api lookup of feat(CL-4mt) in sussdorff/library-core, unrelated to dry-run contract). Confirmed with git stash that both TestMigrationCommit tests fail on HEAD without the fix diff applied.

commands.command: uv run python scripts/library.py mcp use test-mcp --dry-run --json (with fixture declaring claude_code + claude_ios harnesses, in a tempdir catalog)
commands.purpose: Smoke-test that REGRESSION 1 and 3 fixes produce the expected JSON shape: global ~/.claude/settings.json path for claude_code, path=null operation for claude_ios, target_paths excludes URL-only harness.
commands.observed_result: operations contains {path: '/Users/malte/.claude/settings.json', harness=claude_code} and {path: null, 'no file write', harness=claude_ios}; target_paths == ['/Users/malte/.claude/settings.json']; harness_routing=all.

commands.command: uv run python scripts/library.py guardrail use test-gr --dry-run --json (tempdir catalog)
commands.purpose: Smoke-test REGRESSION 2: guardrail dry-run reports global ~/.claude/settings.json and ~/.codex/hooks.json paths.

commands.command: uv run python scripts/library.py prompt use test-prompt --harness codex --dry-run --json (tempdir catalog)
commands.purpose: Smoke-test REGRESSION 4: simple-file primitive emits harness_routing=null despite --harness codex on the command line.
commands.observed_result: harness_routing=null; target_paths contains a single .claude/commands/test-prompt.md path; install target does not depend on harness.
